image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know your brain is super active while you sleep?
Context visual: These bursts of activity, called sleep spindles, are crucial for memory.
Escalation visual: Recent studies suggest they help strengthen what we learn while awake.
Evidence visual: Research shows a clear link: more sleep spindles equal better memory retention.
Payoff visual: Imagine harnessing this power for learning!
Cta visual: Want to boost your memory? Prioritize your sleep! Follow for more insights.
